Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Quickriver]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Quickriver is an Archlord weapon that is a whip of liquid steel which can stiffen into a saber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Quickriver is a whip used by Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Quickriver is a whip that can also be used as a liquid metal blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Quickriver is a liquid metal blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Quickriver is Sophara's liquid metal whip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara slashed Quickriver at Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Quickriver is a technique that pierced Ruby’s chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Quickriver was covered in orange flame.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
